response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates exceptional software development expertise across multiple domains and has proven ability to lead and mentor through workshops, critical gaps make them unsuitable for this role. Most significantly, German language proficiency is explicitly required at C1 level but the candidate has only basic German. Additionally, the role requires strong IT architecture and UML expertise, neither of which is evident in the resume. The candidate's background is primarily hands-on full-stack development rather than IT architecture leadership and requirements management.
strengths: Extensive modern software development experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with proven ability to select appropriate technologies
Founder of open-source GISCollective platform demonstrating strategic thinking, initiative, and expertise in information management and geo-data systems
Demonstrated teaching and mentoring skills through multiple workshops on web internals, TDD, and testing methodologies
concerns: German language proficiency listed as Basic but role explicitly requires C1 level — critical gap for Berlin-based role with probable German-speaking stakeholders
No evidence of UML expertise or IT architecture background — both explicitly required qualifications missing from resume
Limited demonstration of team management and formal project management experience despite senior titles; scope of leadership responsibilities unclear

key_factors.factor: German language proficiency (C1 required, candidate has Basic)
Missing UML expertise and IT architecture focus
Open-source technology leadership and Linux/Unix background
